title: No Build Limit
description: Increased build height limit! Build from -64 to +2032
body:
![no build limit datapack/mod title image minecraft](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/titles/no_build_limit.png)
[![jodeks datapacks discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Discord.png)](https://discord.gg/z2n3qTzQY6)   [![datapacks jodek youtube](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/YouTube.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@jodek)   [![no build limit minecraft datapack github issues](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Issues.png)](https://github.com/jodeks-datapacks/no-build-limit/issues)   [![jodeks datapacks kofi](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Kofi.png)](https://ko-fi.com/jodek)   [![github sponsor jodek](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Sponsor.png)](https://github.com/sponsors/Jodekq)
**Increases the build height limit to Y = 2032** The min Y stays at Y = -64 **How to install:** - Put the datapack/mod in the corresponding folder - Rejoin your world or restart the server ## How to remove it safely _or fix it if your world got corrupted_ If you remove it 1. Create a backup of your corrupted world or server 2. Recreate the world using the same seed (and terrain generation options) 3. Remove only the No Build Limit datapack/mod from your mod list 4. Download [Amulet](https://www.amuletmc.com/) 5. Follow the [FAQ](https://www.amuletmc.com/faq) 1. Make sure both world are closed in game 2. Open the input world using the open world button 3. Click on the convert tab on the left 4. Click on "Select Output World" and find the output world 5. Click convert and wait for the conversion to finish 6. Close the world in Amulet 6. Backup your clean Amulet world 7. Inside the /world folder of that world, there should be folder like DIM1, DIM-1 and so on 8. Everything in this /world folder can be copied from the corrupted world to the clean Amulet world, EXCEPT for: - /world/data/region - /world/DIM-1/region - /world/DIM1/region - /world/data/chunks.data 9. Start the new clean world, and it should be stable
